name: West Coast Fiberglass Pools
tagline: Sonoma County's fiberglass pool specialists — 1,500+ pools and counting.
seoDescription: West Coast Fiberglass Pools is a family-owned, CSLB-licensed swimming pool builder serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County for over 30 years — fiberglass pool

contact.address: 2360 Mendocino Ave, Ste A2-387, Santa Rosa, CA 95403

sections.heading: Fiberglass pools, done by people who only build pools
sections.subheading: For more than 30 years and over 1,500 installs, the Cerini family has built fiberglass swimming pools across Sonoma, Napa, Lake, and Mendocino — a focused craft, not a sideline.
badges: Family-owned by the Cerini family — over 30

sections.heading: Three decades of one craft
body: West Coast Fiberglass Pools is a family-owned business proudly managed and owned by Jeff and Zanne Cerini along with their son, Tyler. For more than 30 years they have specialized exclusively in fiberglass pool installation — and with over 1,500 pools in the ground, the experience shows in every project.

That focus is the whole point: where many contractors build pools among a dozen other things, the Cerinis do one thing and do it well. The company is CSLB-licensed with a BuildZoom score that ranks in the top 2% of California's licensed contractors, and earns consistent 5-star reviews for craftsmanship and follow-through long after the pool is filled.
highlights: CSLB-licensed pool builder — top 2% BuildZoom score in California
Family-owned by the Cerini family — over 30 years in business

items.title: Fiberglass Pool Construction
items.description: Full fiberglass swimming pool installation, from layout and excavation to a finished, swim-ready pool.

items.title: New Pool Construction
items.description: New backyard pools sized and shaped to your space, your family, and your budget.

items.title: Spas & Water Features
items.description: Integrated spas and water features that turn a pool into a backyard retreat.

items.title: Pool Options & Upgrades
items.description: Finishes, decking, lighting, and equipment options matched to how you'll actually use the pool.

items.title: Pool Renovation
items.description: Updates and renovations that bring an older pool back to life.
